---
title: "About"
---

![](assets/headshot.jpg){.headshot fig-alt="Tristan Labagala"}

Hi there! My name is Tristan Labagala and I am final year Bachelor of Commerce (Business Analytics)/Bachelor of Information Systems (Business Information Technology) student at Monash University. I am passionate about utilising data to uncover insights and solve real problems.

<!-- Replace the placeholder text above and the details below with your own. -->

## What I work on



## Tools

R (tidyverse, ggplot2, fixest, lme4, mgcv) · Python (scikit-learn, LightGBM,
matplotlib) · SQL · Excel · Quarto · Git · VS Code 

## Elsewhere

- [GitHub](https://github.com/tlabagala)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tristan-labagala/)
<!-- Drop a cv.pdf into assets/ to enable the CV link, or remove that line. -->
